steps.action: Run preset run with nonexistent preset
steps.expected: JSON error with ok:false, error.code, error.message, error.hint, error.retryable
steps.observed: JSON error with ok:false, code:PRESET_NOT_FOUND, message, hint, retryable:false

steps.action: Run preset add with duplicate name
steps.expected: JSON error with PRESET_EXISTS code and actionable hint
steps.observed: JSON error with code:PRESET_EXISTS, hint suggesting preset edit command

steps.action: Run preset add with valid parameters
steps.expected: JSON success with ok:true, command, result
steps.observed: JSON success with ok:true, command string, result object containing preset details

steps.action: Run preset show with existing preset
steps.expected: JSON success with ok:true and preset details
steps.observed: JSON success with ok:true, command, result containing preset fields

steps.expected: JSON success with ok:true and presets array
steps.observed: JSON success with ok:true, command, result with count and presets array

steps.expected: Help output with usage, subcommands, flags
steps.observed: Detailed help with subcommand list, usage, flags, global flags, and examples

steps.expected: Help output with usage, flags, examples
steps.observed: Detailed help with usage syntax, all flags documented, output schema, and usage examples
Clean JSON output suitable for jq piping, no ANSI codes
Clean JSON output with success response
Clean JSON error output without decorations

steps.expected: JSON with additional debug fields (schemaVersion, timestamp)
steps.observed: JSON output includes schemaVersion:'1.0' and timestamp in ISO format

steps.expected: Verbose output has extra fields non-verbose lacks
steps.observed: Without --verbose: ok, command, result. With --verbose: adds schemaVersion and timestamp
Valid JSON output without ANSI color codes
Command runs successfully, config flag processed
Command runs successfully, profile flag processed

steps.expected: Global flags documented (config, profile, no-color, json, output, verbose)
steps.observed: All global flags documented in help output

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All CLI output format assertions validated successfully. Error responses follow consistent JSON structure with code, message, hint, and retryable fields. Success responses have ok:true with command and result. Help information is comprehensive. JSON output flag produces clean JSON. Verbose mode adds schemaVersion and timestamp. All global flags (config, profile, no-color) work correctly.
